hero_title: Cultivating Character, Building Competency, Embracing Inclusivity.
hero_desc: We work towards education, healthcare, and sustainable development for underserved communities.
about_desc: Founded in 2015 with the support of employees of Kanpur Plastipack Ltd. and registered as a charitable trust in 2021, Nek Kaaj Charitable Society works to bring happiness to underprivileged and neglected communities through initiatives such as festival celebrations, educational support for visually impaired children, seasonal relief distribution, mobility assistance, and support to schools.
focus_edu_desc: Access to quality education for all children.
cta_title: Be a Part of the Change
cta_desc: Your guidance and cooperation will further strengthen our enthusiasm for social work.
cta_desc1: Whether through time, resources, or goodwill, your support can become a ray of hope in the life of someone in need.
cta_desc2: Come, join in this noble cause and take a step forward together in the service of humanity.
cta_desc3: 'Service is the true religion' — with this spirit we move ahead, aspiring for your cooperation.
footer_about: We are a non-profit organization committed to empowering communities through education, healthcare, and sustainable development.
about_who_desc: 'Nek Kaaj Charitable Society' was initiated in 2015 with the collaboration of appointed staff members of Kanpur Plastipack Ltd., which is perhaps a unique initiative started by appointed staff members of an industry in India. The organization was established as a registered charitable trust in 2021. The organization is actively working to bring happiness to the lives of the underprivileged, needy, and neglected sections of society. The organization currently provides services in activities such as distributing sweets, gujiyas, etc., during Hindu festivals, providing braille books to visually impaired children in the field of education, distributing blankets in autumn, towels (gamchas) in summer, wheelchairs to mute and deaf children, fans and school bags in schools.
vision_desc1: Distribution of sweets and other items during Hindu festivals
vision_desc2: Providing stationery kits especially to underprivileged children
vision_desc3: Distribution of blankets in winter and towels (gamchas) in summer
vision_desc4: Taking care of the education of hearing-impaired children
vision_desc5: Distribution of fans and school bags in schools
mission_desc2: Supporting the needs, requirements, and dignified life of senior citizens
mission_desc4: Organizing annual exams, competitive exams, and subject-related events for children in industrial areas
founder_message_text: We are doing the small charity to inculcate the spirit of humanity.
inspired_by_subtitle: Our values and mission are shaped by the lives and teachings of these great visionaries.
special_thanks_subtitle: We express our heartfelt gratitude to all individuals and organizations whose support, trust, and dedication have strengthened our mission and made our work possible.
special_thanks_role1: Deputy Managing Director, Kanpur Plastipack Ltd.
special_thanks_role2: Chairman, Industrial Cooperative Society, Dada Nagar, Kanpur
special_thanks_role3: Member of Uttar Pradesh Legislative Council
special_thanks_role4: All India Business Head, Amar Ujala
donate_banner_desc: One small act of kindness can change the world.
thankyou_desc: Your generosity helps us continue our mission of serving the underprivileged and spreading happiness. Every contribution, big or small, makes a meaningful difference.
thankyou_note: We deeply appreciate your trust and kindness.
contact_subtitle: We would love to hear from you. Whether you have questions, want to get involved, or need assistance, feel free to reach out to us.
program_title1: Distribution of blankets in harsh winter
program_desc1: Nek Kaaj Charitable Society, during the winter season, in the service of humanity, blankets were distributed among poor and needy people. This effort became a source of relief and support for those shivering in the cold. Along with a blanket, we shared a smile and hope, which is the core purpose of our service.
program_title2: Holi, the festival of colours, is a sweet gift
program_desc2: On the auspicious occasion of Holi, we make a small effort to add not only colors but also sweetness to everyone's lives. Our society is distributing packets of sweets along with gulal to poor and needy people, so that this festival can bring smiles to every face.
program_desc3: On the auspicious occasion of Diwali, Nek Kaaj Charitable Society is distributing sweet packets among needy and poor families. The purpose of this initiative was: 'To bring smiles to every face, to spread sweetness in every home, and to connect the festival with the service of humanity.'
program_title4: Happy Makar Sankranti with sweet wishes
program_desc4: On the auspicious occasion of Makar Sankranti, the Nek Kaaj Society distributed sweets to the poor and needy. While this festival marks the sun's Uttarayan, it also conveys the message of charity, service, and harmony. Our aim has been to ensure that the sweetness and joy of the festival reaches every section of society.
program_title5: Distribution of towels among the needy people
program_desc5: Nek Kaaj Charitable Society, every year during the summer season, gamchas (thin cotton towels) are distributed among the needy. In the scorching sun and intense heat, this small effort becomes a means of providing relief and respect. This annual service activity is a symbol of our dedication and commitment to humanity.
program_title6: Sharing the joy of festivals in old age homes
program_desc6: On auspicious occasions like Holi, Diwali, and Khichdi, visiting old age homes, distributing sweets to the elderly, receiving their blessings, and bringing smiles to their faces — this is our true, noble and humanitarian charitable purpose.
program_title7: Braille sheets were donated to blind students of the blind school.
program_desc7: Braille sheets were donated to visually impaired students of the blind school in Ramkrishna Nagar by Nek Kaaj Charitable Society. This initiative is a meaningful step towards encouraging education and supporting a bright future for these children.
sloka1_meaning: Service is for the benefit of others, life is the means of right. He who is ever steadfast in the welfare of others, that verily is the Supreme Person.
sloka2_meaning: The religion (or duty) which is for the benefit of others is the highest.
philosophy_sanskrit_meaning: In all 18 Purāṇas composed by Vyāsa, two lines resound: helping others leads to merit, while harming others leads to sin. This distilled wisdom encapsulates the moral fabric of dharmic life.
philosophy_hero_subtitle: Where tradition meets purpose, and service becomes a way of life.
philosophy_para1: Nek Kaaj Charitable Society's objective is to connect today's young professionals with philanthropy and culture—a confluence that represents the harmonious blend of progress and tradition.
philosophy_para2_part1: The aim here is not merely to foster religious affiliation, but rather to
philosophy_para2_part2: in one's life. When young individuals internalize these values before stepping into the professional world, they emerge not only as competent professionals but also establish themselves as responsible citizens, social reformers, and exemplary human beings.
philosophy_para3: This mindset will not only lead to societal betterment but will also ensure enhanced productivity, transparency, and collective growth within the workplace.
